title: Implement TUI messaging flows
description: Why this exists: messaging is the core operator workflow for the native client. What needs to be done: implement inbox/thread list, message detail, compose/send, delivery state, received-message notifications, timestamp/source display, error display, and basic contact/node selection backed by the shared native client model. Acceptance criteria: user can view received messages, compose outbound text, send through BLE or IP/CoAP without changing UI behavior, see delivery/result state, and recover from transport errors; tests cover send success, send failure, inbound message update, and empty-state rendering.
notes:
Implementation evidence for TUI messaging flows:
- Added Chats inbox/thread rendering backed by shared MessageRecord/MessageDraft/SendResult model.
- Added compose target/body inputs, Enter-to-send from the body input, selected-message contact fill, delivery/result rows, recoverable error rows, timestamp/source/body detail, and unread accounting that does not count local sends.
- Added IP/CoAP CLI wiring: lichen-native-tui --coap-base-uri builds an LciClient with AiocoapResourceTransport and app lifecycle connects/disconnects it.
- Added live inbox Observe handling: o starts a background Observe loop, applies each normalized inbox snapshot, and cancels/closes on app unmount.
- Created follow-up project-LICHEN-q279 for BLE packet transport to LCI ResourceTransport bridge; current BLE packet transport is not yet a ResourceTransport, so real BLE messaging remains deferred.
- Created follow-up project-LICHEN-u9jk for simulator /messages vs LCI /msg contract reconciliation.

Local validation:
- cd python && uv run ruff check src/lichen/tui tests/tui pyproject.toml -> passed.
- cd python && uv run mypy src/lichen/tui tests/tui -> passed, no issues in 4 source files.
- cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui tests/client -q -> 61 passed in 3.97s.
- git diff --check -> passed.

Code review:
- Epicurus re-review: no blocking P0/P1/P2 findings; confirmed live Observe, recovery gating, draft preservation, contact fill, IP/CoAP lifecycle tests, and follow-up Beads.
- Ampere re-review: no P0/P1/P2 findings; reran focused python/tests/tui/test_native.py -> 22 passed.

No EC2 used for this Python-only task.
